configuration.anthropic_api_key: Anthropic API key (starts with sk-ant-). Keep this secret.
configuration.github_token: GitHub Personal Access Token for HACS/integration discovery via GitHub Search API (optional).
configuration.poll_interval_minutes: Auto-run interval in minutes (0 = manual only).
configuration.include_logs: Include recent HA Core and Supervisor logs in the analysis context.
configuration.logs_max_lines: Maximum number of log lines to collect per source (core, supervisor).
configuration.allow_write_homeassistant_config: Allow the add-on to write dashboard YAML files to /homeassistant after approval. Must be true for the execution plan to apply changes.
